title: WATER BUCKET. RELEASE!
description: Chuck water right out of buckets at sonic speeds - a new wacky way of bucket-clutching!
body:
**To hurl water right out of your bucket, drop it while crouching in midair.**

Be warned as there remains a bit of challenge in clutching that you'll need to get used to. My advice is to look **directly** beneath you and pray that the velocity of the resulting projectile is enough to outspeed your fall and that it lands in the center of a block.

You can launch these projectiles to peeve off mobs and other players too! I will not be held accountable for any angry mobs that shall ensue as a result.


<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/5wLcNKZgfvg" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>
(Note: Jac- err.. Steve yelling "RELEASE!!" as shown in the clip is cut from this mod and irrelevant in the showcase)
